rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §38.221 defines opioid antagonist and physician fora health subchapter. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: "Opioid antagonist" and "opioid-related drug overdose" have the meanings assigned by Section 483.101, Health and Safety Code.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
